channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: X begins testing standalone X Chat app on iOS
item.description: The new app promises a way to send and receive messages without being distracted by your timeline.

item.title: MacBook Neo : Apple aurait dévoilé par erreur le nom du MacBook « low cost »
item.description: L'annonce la plus attendue d'Apple cette semaine est sans aucun doute son tout nouveau MacBook. Il devrait être dévoilé ce mercredi 4 mars 2026, mais en attendant, Apple aurait publié par erreur son nom : MacBook Neo.

item.title: Unihertz’s new QWERTY phone is even more like a Blackberry
item.description: Unihertz, known for its slab phone alternatives, has unveiled an evolution of its device with a physical keyboard: The Titan 2 Elite. It's smaller and sleeker than the (aptly named) Titan that precedes it, comes in the orange color that's all the rage right now, and looks a heck of a lot like a Blackberry. […]

item.title: Apple unveils new MacBook Air and MacBook Pro with M5
item.description: These updated M5 chips were specifically designed to make the MacBook Air and MacBook Pro laptops better at handling intensive AI tasks.

item.title: Get up to $50 to watch For All Mankind season 5 with this stellar VPN deal
item.description: NordVPN is the best streaming VPN for unlocking content everywhere including For All Mankind 2026 – and you can buy Nord for 74% off with a free Amazon $50 voucher worth .

item.title: Apple's cheap MacBook could be called the MacBook Neo
item.description: “MacBook Neo” appears to be the name of Apple’s long-rumored cheap MacBook, based on a regulatory posting on Apple’s website, MacRumors reports. The gaffe was quickly removed from Apple’s site (pour one out for the poor soul who posted it). Previous rumors didn’t attach a name to the low-cost MacBook — I figured Apple would just revive the clean and simple “MacBook” branding. The name MacBook Neo sounds like something we’d see from ASUS or Acer, it’s just trying a bit too hard to seem cool.To recap, Apple is expected to unveil its first low-cost MacBook laptop tomorrow (and personally, I think...

item.title: Le MacBook pas cher pourrait bien s’appeler… MacBook Neo
item.description: Après le MacBook Air et le MacBook Pro, place au… MacBook Neo ! Ce n’est pas une blague, le fameux portable « pas cher » qu’Apple semble garder au chaud jusqu’à probablement demain a fuité (!) sur le site du constructeur. Mais en dehors du nom, c’est tout ce que l’on sait pour le moment.

item.title: The best mobile tech announced at MWC 2026 so far
item.description: Mobile World Congress 2026 is still in full swing in Barcelona, Spain, with announcements continuing to come from the mobile-focused show that runs until March 5th. To make sure you don't miss the best new smartphones, laptops, concepts, and accessories, we're rounding up all the most newsworthy gadgets that have debuted so far at MWC […]

item.title: 2025 was the year AI grew up. How will AI evolve in 2026?
item.description: What we can expect from AI going forward - from proactive AI to invisible intelligence.

item.title: Pourquoi le MacBook Air M5 est plus performant en Wi-Fi que le MacBook Pro de base
item.description: Apple vient de dévoiler son MacBook Air M5 dernier cri. Au-delà de sa puce, ce nouvel ultraportable intègre désormais le Wi-Fi 7. De quoi dépasser un MacBook Pro M5 de base relégué à l'ancienne norme de connectivité.

item.title: 2027 Audi RS5 first drive: Big thrills with a big battery
item.description: There's more waffling going on about the future of electric vehicles in America right now than you might expect at a Belgian breakfast buffet. Some brands like Hyundai are staying committed, some brands like Honda are dialing back, and everyone else is simply doing their damndest to provide as many propulsion options as possibleCount Audi in that last category. On the EV side, it recently launched the new Q6 E-Tron and refreshed the ballistic E-Tron GT. On the internal combustion side, it has a new A6, and there's a full-size, three-row SUV coming in the form of the Q9. The company's latest ca...

item.title: All of Amazon’s kid-friendly Kindles are on sale, including the color version
item.description: Let me let you in on a little secret: Amazon’s kid-friendly e-readers are a better deal than the standard models. Each so-called “Kids” device is identical to its non-Kids counterpart, except that it comes with a protective case, an extended two-year warranty against damage, and six months of Amazon Kids Plus. They also include optional […]

item.title: Everything Apple announced this week: iPhone 17e, new MacBooks, M4 iPad Air and more
item.description: Apple has promised a “big week” for the company, which includes an in-person event for press and creators on March 4. But it didn’t exactly wait until Wednesday to get things started. The news started on Monday with the announcements of the iPhone 17e and M4-powered iPad Air. The company followed up on Tuesday with the reveal of the M5 MacBook Air, the M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, MacBook Pro models that use said chips, a refreshed Studio Display and a brand-new 27-inch Studio Display XDR.Here’s our recap of everything Apple has announced so far this week:iPhone 17eAppleApple has spruced up this y...

item.title: This powerhouse MSI laptop pairs 13th Gen Core i7 performance with RTX 4050 graphics for seriously heavy workloads - and it's just had a price cut
item.description: MSI Cyborg laptop packs a Core i7-13620H CPU, RTX 4050 GPU, 16GB of DDR5 memory, and a 512GB NVMe SSD, giving creatives and multitaskers the speed and graphics power they need.

item.title: À moins de 500 €, le Xiaomi 14T Pro avec 512 Go de stockage reste une excellente option malgré l’arrivée du 15T Pro en fin d’année dernière
item.description: Avec le 14T Pro, Xiaomi propose un smartphone haut de gamme accessible qui brille avec son écran AMOLED et son module photo Leica, surtout qu'il passe de 899,99 euros à 488,99 euros sur Cdiscount.

item.title: Microsoft warns of OAuth phishing campaigns able to bypass email and browser defenses - says 'these campaigns demonstrate that this abuse is operational, not theoretical'
item.description: An OAuth feature is being abused in the wild to drop malware to people's computers.

item.title: What do you think of EVs? Take our survey for a chance to win a £100 Amazon voucher
item.description: Take our drivers' survey for a chance to win a £100 Amazon voucher

item.title: The super-fast Asus ROG Rapture Wi-Fi 6E router got 5 stars in our review - now it's just $290 with Newegg's promo code
item.description: Asus ROG Rapture GT-AXE16000 router drops to under $300 and delivers quad-band Wi-Fi 6E speeds up to 16000Mbps, dual 10G ports, and a 2.5G WAN port.

item.title: Quelle est la meilleure voiture Tesla à choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Si la marque Tesla vous attire, mais que vous avez du mal à vous y retrouver entre les différentes versions disponibles, ce guide est fait pour vous. Découvrez les différents véhicules de la gamme pour y voir plus clair et déterminer quelle Tesla choisir.

item.title: Apple Announces M5 MacBook Air With Double the Starting Storage
item.description: Double the storage but more expensive than the MacBook Air M4, too.

item.title: The Future of ‘Dungeons & Dragons’ Is Looking a Little Video Game-y
item.description: Wizards of the Coast's new roadmap for 'D&D' in 2026 looks a little less tabletop, and a little more live service.

item.title: We played Pokémon Pokopia, ask us anything
item.description: Pokémon's 30th anniversary is here and Nintendo (and The Pokémon Company, Game Freak, and Omega Force) are kicking things off with a surprisingly excellent life simulation spinoff game. Pokémon Pokopia arrives on March 5th, and it's one of the first Pokémon titles that will debut exclusively on the Nintendo Switch 2. Equal parts Animal Crossing, […]...

item.title: Scott Pilgrim creator Bryan Lee O’Malley on taking ‘another run’ with new game
item.description: It's been a busy few years for Scott Pilgrim. Following a live-action film and the conclusion of the comics in 2010, the series has slowly been coming back to life. First, in 2021 Scott Pilgrim vs. The World: The Game was rereleased on modern consoles after years of being inaccessible. Two years later came an […]

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, March 4 (game #997)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, March 4 (game #731)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: 'The sub-$500 entry-level PC segment will disappear by 2028': Gartner predicts that budget computers are on borrowed time
item.description: Severity of RAM crisis could mean the sub-$500 PC market will 'disappear by 2028' according to one analyst firm.

item.title: Why the best teams treat feedback as a practice—not an event
item.description: It can be tough to give. It can be uncomfortable. But withholding honest feedback is a disservice—to employees, and to the company. One of the great tales from basketball lore is how coach Phil Jackson led teams like the Bulls and the Lakers to dynasty status. Working with legends like Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant, he might have let the all-stars run the show. Instead, his success hinged on transparency. Jackson gave players clear, constructive feedback. For example, he urged Jordan to cut back on scoring and involve his teammates more, recognizing that team success required more than a scor...

item.title: Europe’s digital infrastructure is running out of room in its traditional centers
item.description: Demand for compute is colliding with physical and regulatory limits in FLAP markets.

item.title: Apple dévoile le Studio Display 2 et le Studio Display XDR, voici les nouveautés des 2 écrans
item.description: Apple muscle sa gamme d’écrans avec un nouveau Studio Display qui peaufine la formule de 2022 et un Studio Display XDR beaucoup plus ambitieux.

item.title: Apple announces new M5 MacBook Air, now with 512GB of starting storage for $1,099
item.description: Apple announced new M5 MacBook Air laptop as part of its "big week" of product launches. Preorders open March 4 ahead of a March 11 launch.

item.title: Capcom retire le DRM polémique de Resident Evil 4 Remake, les joueurs ont gagné
item.description: Il n'aura même pas tenu un mois. Après avoir retiré Denuvo du remake de Resident Evil 4, Capcom réitère l'opération avec son DRM maison, Enigma, suite à la gronde des joueurs.

item.title: Apple’s New Studio Displays Are Here, but Only One of Them Has 120Hz and HDR
item.description: Make sure you buy the correct one.

item.title: Apple’s new Studio displays come with Thunderbolt 5
item.description: The new displays come with better cameras, new sound systems, and Thunderbolt 5 ports.

item.title: MacBook M5 Pro et Max : on vous explique le passage secret d’Apple vers l’architecture chiplet
item.description: Ce que vient de faire Apple avec sa "Fusion Architecture" est bien plus qu’une simple mise à jour annuelle. En passant au design chiplet, la marque à la pomme change radicalement sa façon de construire des processeurs.

item.title: 'She's a 10, but also decaying' — the five zombies from Resident Evil Requiem I wish I could be friends with
item.description: Sorry Leon, but these iconic zombies are the five Resident Evil Requiem characters I want to hang out with.

item.title: Apple's New MacBook Air and MacBook Pro Have New Chips, More Storage, and Higher Prices
item.description: Apple seems to be saving the entry-level MacBook for its event tomorrow, but instead, we have two new pricey Studio Display computer monitors.

item.title: Apple unveils M5 Pro and M5 Max chips with new ‘Fusion Architecture’
item.description: The chips are engineered around Apple's new Fusion Architecture, an advanced design that merges two dies into a single, high-performance system on a chip (SoC).

item.title: Apple just dropped the next-gen Studio Display and Studio Display XDR — here's what's new
item.description: Apple just updated its Studio Display with an upgraded camera, more advanced ports, and better sound, but it also ushered in a new Studio Display XDR to replace the Pro Display XDR.

item.title: Nouveau MacBook Air : plus puissant, plus de stockage, pour (presque) le même prix
item.description: Tous les constructeurs souffrent de la flambée des prix de la mémoire. Tous ? Non ! Apple résiste encore et toujours avec le tout nouveau MacBook Air qui, non content d’intégrer une puce M5, offre le double de stockage pour (presque) le même prix.

item.title: The 6G, modular, robot phones of the future
item.description: Year after year, we mostly know what to expect from our smartphone upgrades. Galaxy, iPhone, Pixel, or whatever else, everything seems to get slightly better (and occasionally more expensive) without many surprises in store. That's not to say there are no new ideas left in smartphones, though. You just have to know where to look. […]

item.title: Puces M5 Pro et M5 Max : Apple décuple la puissance des MacBook Pro avec l’architecture Fusion
item.description: Apple annonce ses toutes nouvelles puces M5 Pro et M5 Max, basées sur une architecture inédite, pour propulser sa nouvelle génération d'ordinateurs portables.

item.title: How to watch Como vs. Internazionale in the Coppa Italia online for free
item.description: How to watch Coppa Italia for free. Live stream Como vs. Internazionale in the 2026 Coppa Italia for free.

item.title: Xiaomi, unlike Google and Samsung, thinks camera hardware comes first
item.description: When it launched the 17 and 17 Ultra in Europe on Saturday, Xiaomi bucked an industry trend: it didn't really talk about AI all that much. And it really didn't talk about AI when it showed off the two phones' cameras, including a special edition 17 Ultra co-created with Leica. According to Angus Ng, the […]

item.title: As a comic book fan, TCL showed me my dream smartphone at MWC 2026
item.description: TCL combines its NXTPAPER tech with AMOLED to create this comic nerd’s dream phone.

item.title: The MacBook Air M5 starts at $1,099, up $100 from the M4
item.description: Reports had suggested that Apple wasn’t going to reveal a refreshed MacBook Air with an M5 chip during its week of announcements, but whaddyaknow? Apple just went ahead and did that exact thing. Let’s deal with the bad news first: Apple is reverting a price cut from last year. It dropped the M4-powered MBA’s starting price down to $999, but for the M5-equipped model, you’ll need to shell out at least $1,099.The company claimed the M5 MacBook Air will be able to deliver four times faster performance in AI tasks than the M4 MBA. Compared with the M1 MacBook Air, you’ll get up to 9.5 times faster...

item.title: Windows 11 vous laissera configurer la touche Impr écran de votre clavier
item.description: Plus de possibilités pour une touche souvent utilisée.

item.title: Blue Prince headlines Nintendo’s lineup of Switch 2 indie games
item.description: Following a Direct in February and a Pokémon-focused event last week, Nintendo returned today with a showcase focused on indie games. And it ended with a big one: the absorbing, room-shifting puzzle game Blue Prince is launching on the Switch 2. Even better, it'll be available later today. The rest of the titles revealed during […]

item.title: Why is SpaceX going public?
item.description: I am excited about the SpaceX IPO for all the reasons investors shouldn't be. Maybe it'll be a real marquee moment for Silicon Valley, but I see the potential for a shitshow. After all, more than a decade ago, Musk said that SpaceX going public before going to Mars would be bad for the company. […]

item.title: Game Pass en mars 2026 : Cyberpunk 2077, Hollow Knight Silksong, KCD2… Voici la première vague de jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft frappe fort avec les premières sorties de mars sur le Game Pass ! Outre les récents Hollow Knight : Silksong et Kingdom Come : Deliverance II, Cyberpunk 2077 arrive également sur console et sur le cloud.

item.title: The MacBook Air M5 has landed — here's what's new on our favorite laptop
item.description: Apple has just updated its most popular laptop – here's what's new in the MacBook Air M5.

item.title: Apple’s new Studio Display XDR adds a Mini LED upgrade
item.description: After a few years between updates, Apple has two new 5K monitor options, ranging from expensive to very expensive, with the 27-inch 5K Studio Display and Studio Display XDR. Both have 5,120 x 2,880 resolutions and 12MP Center Stage cameras embedded inside - we'll be eager to see how much better those are this time […]

item.title: Apple unveils the M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, which feature new, faster 'super cores'
item.description: As part of its big week of announcements, Apple has unveiled a new pair of M5 chips alongside two new MacBooks. The new M5 Pro and M5 Max chips will power the new MacBook Pro that was just announced today, while the new MacBook Air comes with the base M5. According to the company’s press release, the M5 Pro and M5 Max come with an “advanced GPU with Neural Accelerators and higher unified memory bandwidth for a massive increase in AI compute.”At the heart of the M5 Pro and M5 Max are what Apple is calling a new “Fusion Architecture” that “combines two dies into a single system on a chip (SoC).”...

item.title: Apple brings its M5 Pro and Max silicon to the next MacBook Pro generation
item.description: It happened much later than we expected, but Apple's announcement of MacBook Pros with its M5 Pro and M5 Max chips has finally arrived. These more powerful variants on Apple's silicon will be available in the 14-inch and 16-inch models of the laptops. Pre-orders will open on March 4 with an expected ship date of March 11. You’ll want to save some extra coin this time, though, as prices have gone up compared to the prior generation. The new 14-inch MacBook Pro can be kitted out with either an M5 Pro or M5 Max. The Pro option for the chip boasts a CPU with 15 or 18 CPU cores and 16 or 20 GPU cor...

item.title: Ne perdez plus les pédales avec le compteur GPS vélo Garmin Edge 540 à -52 % et son GNSS multi-bandes ultra précis
item.description: Pour tous les cyclistes avertis qui souhaitent un compagnon sérieux et endurant lors de toutes leurs sorties, voici le compteur GPS Garmin Edge 540 vendu 176,56 euros sur AliExpress au lieu de 369,99 euros.

item.title: MacBook Air M5 : Apple renouvelle son MacBook le plus léger avec de belles surprises
item.description: Le nouveau MacBook Air est officiel. Cette année 2026, Apple ne change pas la recette, mais fait une simple mise à niveau de la puce. Il se dote désormais d'une puce Apple M5.

item.title: Apple’s M5 Pro and M5 Max MacBook Pros Are Performance Monsters
item.description: Pick your choice of 14-inch or 16-inch laptops with the blazing fast Apple chips.

item.title: En lecture (Now Playing) : la fonction d’identification musicale des Pixel devient une application autonome sur le Play Store
item.description: Jusqu’ici cachée dans les entrailles d’Android, la fonction En écoute des Google Pixel arrive sur le Play Store sous la forme d’une application à part entière, avec un historique enrichi et une interface dédiée.

item.title: C’est incompréhensible, le prix du MacBook Air M4 baisse alors que la RAM augmente
item.description: La logique voudrait que les prix augmentent. Les coûts des puces de RAM explosent, les stocks sont au plus bas, et pourtant, le MacBook Air M4 passe sous la barre des 1 000 €.

item.title: Les MacBook Pro enfin équipés de puces M5 Pro et M5 Max… Trop peu, trop tard ?
item.description: C'était le secret le moins bien gardé d'Apple : les MacBook Pro se déclinent maintenant avec des puces M5 Pro et M5 Max. Quoi de plus normal, après le lancement en octobre dernier du MacBook Pro M5 tout court. Mais attention, ces nouvelles machines risquent d'avoir une durée de vie très courte…

item.title: Pied réglable, 120 Hz et Mini-LED : Apple corrige (enfin) les plus gros défauts de son écran Studio Display XDR
item.description: Apple vient de rafraîchir sa gamme de moniteurs pour les créatifs, les Studio Display. Au programme : une mise à jour du Studio Display classique et surtout l'arrivée d'un tout nouveau « Studio Display XDR » qui emprunte le meilleur du Pro Display XDR dans un format plus compact de 27 pouces. On fait le point.

item.title: Voici les nouveaux MacBook Pro M5 Pro et M5 Max : toujours plus puissants
item.description: Apple dévoile ce mardi 3 mars 2026 sa nouvelle génération de MacBook Pro avec les puces Apple M5 Pro et M5 Max.

item.title: Apple reveals its new 5K mini-LED Studio Display XDR
item.description: Apple continues its gradual unveiling of new products this week with the launch of the Studio Display and an all-new 27-inch Studio Display XDR. The latter is a higher-end model aimed at content creators with a 27-inch 5K Retina XDR display that features a mini-LED display with 2,000-plus dimming zones, up to 2,000 nits of peak HDR brightness and a wider color gamut for improved accuracy. It looks like a replacement for the expensive, nearly seven-year-old 32-inch 6K Pro XDR Display, which is no longer for sale on Apple's website. The Studio Display XDR also has a 120Hz refresh rate, addressin...

item.title: The odds are shifting in the Oscars race: Here are the latest front-runners after last weekend’s Actor Awards
item.description: With industry showcases from SAG, the PGA, and the DGA behind us, surprising new favorites are emerging in the major Academy Award categories. Early this year, the glitz and glamour of Hollywood awards season kicked off with the Critics Choice Awards, and soon everything will culminate with the Academy Awards on March 15.

item.title: The Apple MacBook Pro M5 Pro and M5 Max are official — here's what's new
item.description: Apple has announced new MacBook Pros with M5 Pro and M5 Pro Max chips — and they look like laptop powerhouses.

item.title: Beginners can capture 360° video footage in 4K with this DJI Mini 5 Pro — and it’s on sale right now
item.description: This DJI Mini 5 Pro drone camera is on sale this weekend for 30% off

item.title: 3 ways the attacks on Iran could impact a U.S. economy already hit by tariffs and a weak job market
item.description: Americans could see higher prices at the pump as early as this week. The U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran add yet more question marks around a U.S. economy already buffeted by on-and-off tariffs, weak hiring, and lingering inflationary pressures.The war has already raised oil prices and could lift prices at the pump as early as this week, but the ultimate impact on the economy and inflation will depend on the length and severity of the conflict, economists say. Should it wind down in a week or two, its economic effects would be minor and short-lived.Yet a longer war that pushed oil past $100 ...

item.title: Ditch the laptop! This enterprise-ready HP OmniDesk desktop is built for business - and it's got a $590 discount and a free USB drive right now
item.description: HP OmniDesk desktop packs a 20-core Core i7-14700 processor, 64GB of DDR5 memory, and a massive 4TB SSD.

item.title: ‘Starfleet Academy’ Showrunner Teases Shocking Conclusion to Season 2
item.description: Plus, work's already begun on 'Mortal Kombat 3'.

item.title: Fig Security emerges from stealth with $38M to help security teams deal with change
item.description: Fig traces data flows in the security stack and then alerts security teams when changes at any point affect detection or response capabilities.

item.title: 'The attack requires no exploit, no user clicks, and no explicit request forsensitive actions': Experts say Perplexity's AI Comet browser can be hijacked to steal your passwords
item.description: Security researchers found a zero-click exploit in Perplexity AI browser, and helped fix it.

item.title: How to watch NCIS: Origins season 2 — stream part 2 of Gibbs prequel series
item.description: With Gibbs and Diane hitched, the young agent faces the reactions of his teammates. Here's how to watch NCIS: Origins season 2, part 2 online and from anywhere.

item.title: Shure's next-gen DAI adds mobile support
item.description: XLR microphone owners, rejoice: Shure's successor to the MVX2U Digital Audio Interface (DAI) brings the adapter into the mobile era. The compact MVX2U Gen 2 adds more advanced onboard audio processing. But its most notable upgrade is mobile device compatibility, so you're no longer limited to desktop use.The single-channel MVX2U Gen 2 provides up to +60dB of gain and 48V phantom power. On the processing front, the adapter includes an auto-level mode. There’s also a real-time denoiser to minimize background noise and a pop filter ("Popper Stopper" in Shure marketing-speak) to soften those harsh...

item.title: Meta's AI display glasses reportedly share intimate videos with human moderators
item.description: Users of Meta's AI smart glasses in Europe may be unknowingly sharing intimate video and sensitive financial information with moderators outside of the bloc, according to a report from Sweden's Svenska Dagbladet released last week. Employees in Kenya doing AI "annotation" told the journalists that they've seen people nude, using the toilet and engaging in sexual activity, along with credit card numbers and other sensitive information. With Meta's Ray-Ban Display and other glasses with AI capabilities, users can record what they're looking at or get answers to questions via a Meta AI assistant...

item.title: How to watch Sporting CP vs. Porto in the Taça de Portugal online for free
item.description: How to watch Taça de Portugal for free. Live stream Sporting CP vs. Porto in the 2026 Taça de Portugal for free.

item.title: Raise the kids you have
item.description: Kids, like companies, need you to focus on reality, not wishes When I hosted a client dinner honoring my good friends Jules Kroll and his extraordinary wife Lynn, I did not expect to get one of the best bits of life advice I’d ever heard. Jules and Lynn met in college about 65 years ago and raised four wonderful children together. Toward the end of dinner someone asked, “How do you raise good kids?”...

item.title: The Herman Miller Jarvis is one of the best standing desks we've ever tested, with phenomenal build quality and impressive lifting capacity — and it's 25% off right now
item.description: The Jarvis standing desk has everything I want in a height-adjustable setup, including excellent stability from its sturdy 1-inch laminate top and solid three-stage frame.
